channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: How to apply to Startup Battlefield 2026, what you need ahead of the June 8 deadline
item.description: Startup Battlefield applications are due tomorrow, so now's the time to put the finishing touches on your submission!

item.title: NYT Strands hints and answers for Friday, May 29 (game #817)
item.description: Looking for NYT Strands answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, including the spangram.

item.title: Quordle hints and answers for Friday, May 29 (game #1586)
item.description: Looking for Quordle clues? We can help. Plus get the answers to Quordle today and past solutions.

item.title: NYT Connections hints and answers for Friday, May 29 (game #1083)
item.description: Looking for NYT Connections answers and hints? Here's all you need to know to solve today's game, plus my commentary on the puzzles.

item.title: Quote of the day by AMD CEO Lisa Su: "The age of traditional computing is dead" — marking the start of the heterogeneous computing era
item.description: A decade before GPUs took center stage in the AI buildout, Su projected a future in which conventional processors would no longer reign supreme

item.title: Rockstar developers go public with first union
item.description: The Rockstar Game Workers Union has members across the developer's UK offices.

item.title: Should you take a soft off day?
item.description: From doing laundry to flying to Europe, all while on the company clock. The soft off day is a remote work habit that’s everywhere right now. Is it time theft or just surviving burnout culture? Here’s how people are doing it and what actually matters if you try it. From doing laundry to flying to Europe, all while on the company clock. The soft off day is a remote work habit that’s everywhere right now. Is it time theft or just surviving burnout culture? Here’s how people are doing it and what actually matters if you try it. ...

item.title: The full Microsoft Office suite is just $30, no subscription needed
item.description: Microsoft Office Professional 2021 for Windows is on sale for $29.97 through May 31 at 11:59 p.m. PT and includes eight essential Microsoft productivity apps.

item.title: This tiny $22 cable charges nearly everything you own and opens your beer
item.description: Save on the GoCable 8-in-1 EDC 100W Cable, a compact charging cable with multiple connectors and built-in tools, now $21.99.

item.title: CFTC wants to reverse course on penalty against Winklevoss twins' crypto business
item.description: The Gemini exchange already paid a $5 million fine following the agency's lawsuit.
